evals.description: Grade a student submission on a risk management case study
evals.prompt: Grade this student's exam submission. The case study, questions, rubric, and student answer are provided in the attached files.
expectations: Output includes a mark for each question
Each mark falls within the appropriate rubric band
Partial credit is awarded where understanding is demonstrated
Feedback is brief (2-4 sentences per question)
Generic answers without case reference are penalised

evals.description: Grade a weak submission to test partial credit logic
evals.prompt: Grade this student's exam submission. The case study, questions, rubric, and student answer are provided in the attached files.
expectations: Correctly identifies conceptual understanding where present
Marks align with lower rubric bands

evals.description: Grade an excellent submission to test upper band placement
evals.prompt: Grade this student's exam submission. The case study, questions, rubric, and student answer are provided in the attached files.
expectations: Correctly places answer in top band
Still identifies minor areas for improvement if any
Case application is recognised and credited
